transcript: This apple is a good snack. Let's see if we can make it so good. Ooh, almond flour pancakes. Make the pancake batter, then slice some apples and remove their core. Dip the apples in the pancake batter, then fry them on both sides for a couple minutes. When they come out, roll them in cinnamon sugar and then dig in. Check out Thrive Market for all the healthy without the hassle and take your good snacks to so good.
